task:
/home/user/Documents/workshop_slides.pptx is open in LibreOffice Impress — a 5-slide deck with titles 'Workshop Introduction', 'Agenda', 'Exercise 1', 'Exercise 2', 'Wrap Up'.

Delete the 'Exercise 1' and 'Exercise 2' slides, then insert three new slides between 'Agenda' and 'Wrap Up':
- 'Hands-On Lab 1' — body 'Build a REST API in 30 minutes'; speaker notes 'Ensure all attendees have Node.js installed.'
- 'Hands-On Lab 2' — body 'Deploy to Kubernetes cluster'
- 'Hands-On Lab 3' — body 'Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions'

The final deck must have exactly 6 slides in this order: 'Workshop Introduction', 'Agenda', 'Hands-On Lab 1', 'Hands-On Lab 2', 'Hands-On Lab 3', 'Wrap Up'.

Save the file back to /home/user/Documents/workshop_slides.pptx.

verification.command: check-slide-contains 2 "Build a REST API in 30 minutes"
check-notes-contain 2 "Ensure all attendees have Node.js installed"
check-slide-contains 4 "Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions"

verification.description: File has been saved to disk
